notes: Mobile nav polish + holistic fixes. (1) syncBar pushed above bottom nav and shrunk to dot-only on mobile (no more 'Signed in by rsoun...' overlap). installBanner + updateBanner also pushed up. (2) Drawer redesigned as 'More' menu — only secondary destinations (Net Worth, Scenarios, Settings, Edit inputs, theme, account, sign out). Primary destinations (Budget/Journal/Projection) live in bottom tab bar only. (3) Drawer + hamburger fully hidden on desktop via dedicated min-width: 769px rule. (4) Body classes (auth-active / wizard-active / app-active) added so bottom nav + FAB hide during auth and onboarding wizard. (5) doLogout, DOMContentLoaded, onAuth, launchDashboard, showStep all toggle body state. (6) Sign out + email display added to drawer (replaces masthead logout button hidden on mobile). (7) 'More' tab opens drawer WITH overlay (was missing — drawer couldn't be dismissed by tap-outside). (8) Drawer theme toggle keeps drawer open so user sees the flip. (9) Removed outdated landscape rule that showed desktop sidebar in landscape mobile.
